name: Jagadguru Sri Adi Shankaracharya Mahaswamigal
title: The First Acharya
description: Composed timeless devotional hymns (Stotras) that form the spiritual foundation of many Carnatic kritis.

name: Jagadguru Sri Chandrasekharendra Saraswati
title: Maha Periyava
description: A profound patron of classical arts who guided and blessed countless legendary Carnatic musicians of the 20th century.

name: Jagadguru Sri Jayendra Saraswathi
title: The 69th Pontiff
description: Supported the proliferation of traditional music schools and encouraged the integration of fine arts with Vedic education.

name: Jagadguru Sri Shankara Vijayendra Saraswathi
title: The 70th Pontiff
description: Steadfastly continues the preservation of Carnatic heritage, inspiring youth to take up classical arts through divine blessings.

name: Jagadguru Sri Satya Chandrashekarendra Saraswathi
title: Revered Acharya
description: Upheld the unbroken tradition of linking spiritual discipline with musical devotion across the lineage.
